summary: Plan-only PR inventory shard. No shared canonical was provided, merge/fix/raise_pr actions are blocked, and low-signal closeout is disabled. Deterministic validation identified 23 targets that must be quarantined with route_security; unrelated non-security PRs remain conservatively classified as keep_independent. No close, merge, label, comment, or fix action is planned.
